tasks.name: Onboarding state service
tasks.notes: OnboardingState interface added to types.ts. onboarding.ts implements loadOnboardingState(), saveOnboardingState(), advanceMilestone(), shouldShow(), getOnboardingState(), resetSessionFlags(), markWelcomeBackShown(), _resetForTest(). In-memory singleton loaded once at startup. Atomic write (temp+rename). welcomeBackShownThisSession is module-level var, NOT in OnboardingState.

tasks.name: Text constants module
tasks.notes: Exports BANNER (exact ASCII art from requirements), GETTING_STARTED_GUIDE, WELCOME_BACK(memberCount, onlineCount, lastActive), NUDGE_AFTER_FIRST_REGISTER(memberType), NUDGE_AFTER_FIRST_PROMPT(), NUDGE_AFTER_MULTI_MEMBER(). Token cost comment block included as specified in task addition for 4.1. Review cycle nudge not included (deferred).

checks: npm run build — pre-existing smol-toml TS error in src/cli/install.ts (unrelated to onboarding changes; all onboarding files compile cleanly with no new errors)
npm test — 631 passed, 1 failed (platform.test.ts env PATH test — pre-existing), 1 suite failed (install-multi-provider.test.ts — smol-toml, pre-existing). No regressions from onboarding changes.
onboarding.test.ts — 16 tests, all pass (isolated run confirmed)

preExistingFailures: platform.test.ts > cleanExec > linux: returns pristine env from login shell (PATH undefined)

tasks.name: Central wrapTool() in index.ts
tasks.notes: wrapTool() replaces all 21 inline wrappers. isJsonResponse() exported from onboarding.ts (testable). getOnboardingNudge() is stub returning null (Task 3.1). loadOnboardingState() called once at server start. All 638 tests pass, same 2 pre-existing failures (smol-toml, platform PATH).

tasks.name: First-run banner + getting started guide
tasks.notes: getFirstRunPreamble() returns BANNER+GETTING_STARTED_GUIDE on first call, null thereafter. Persists bannerShown immediately. getOnboardingPreamble() in index.ts delegates to it. 4 new tests cover: fresh install shows banner, second call returns null, persists across restart, upgrade path skips banner.

checks: npm run build — pre-existing smol-toml error only, no new errors
ALL existing tests pass — 638 passed (up from 631), 1 failed (platform PATH — pre-existing), 1 suite failed (smol-toml — pre-existing). No regressions.
getFirstRunPreamble tests: first call shows banner, second returns null, persists across restart, upgrade path skips — all pass

preExistingFailures: platform.test.ts > cleanExec > linux: returns pristine env from login shell (PATH undefined)

tasks.name: Post-registration and post-prompt nudges
tasks.notes: getOnboardingNudge(toolName, input, result) exported from onboarding.ts. register_member (✅ prefix): firstMemberRegistered → NUDGE_AFTER_FIRST_REGISTER(input.member_type); 2+ agents + !multiMemberNudgeShown → NUDGE_AFTER_MULTI_MEMBER(). execute_prompt (📋 prefix): firstPromptExecuted → NUDGE_AFTER_FIRST_PROMPT(). Uses input.member_type directly. index.ts stub replaced with real import. getAllAgents() imported from registry.ts — no circular dep.

tasks.name: Welcome-back message
tasks.notes: getWelcomeBackPreamble() exported from onboarding.ts. Returns null if bannerShown=false (first run) or welcomeBackShownThisSession=true. reads getAllAgents(); lastActive=max(agent.lastUsed) as relative string ('Nm ago', 'Nh ago', 'Nd ago', 'just now', 'unknown' if no lastUsed). Falls back to 'Fleet ready.' when 0 agents. onlineCount=0 (no SSH checks at startup). getOnboardingPreamble() in index.ts: getFirstRunPreamble() ?? getWelcomeBackPreamble().

checks: npm run build — pre-existing smol-toml error only, no new errors
ALL tests pass — 652 passed (up from 638), 1 failed (platform PATH — pre-existing), 1 suite failed (smol-toml — pre-existing). No regressions.

nudge sequence: register(local) → NUDGE_AFTER_FIRST_REGISTER, register again (1 agent) → null, register with 2 agents → NUDGE_AFTER_MULTI_MEMBER, execute_prompt → NUDGE_AFTER_FIRST_PROMPT, execute_prompt again → null — all pass
welcome-back: existing user (bannerShown=true) → first call shows welcome-back with memberCount + lastActive, second call → null — pass
welcome-back fallback: zero agents → 'Fleet ready.' — pass

preExistingFailures: platform.test.ts > cleanExec > linux: returns pristine env from login shell (PATH undefined)

tasks.name: Edge cases and defensive behavior
tasks.notes: Upgrade detection: existing registry + no onboarding.json = skip banner. Verify install CLI doesn't reset data dir. Token cost comment block DONE (already added to text.ts in 1.2 per task addition).

risks.description: wrapTool refactor breaks JSON-returning tools (fleet_status, member_detail, list_members, monitor_task)
risks.mitigation: isJsonResponse() skips prepend when response starts with { or [; monitor_task explicitly tested

risks.description: Prepending to error responses confuses AI agent

risks.mitigation: Treat corrupt file as default state; atomic writes

risks.description: Existing users see banner after upgrade

risks.mitigation: DEFERRED — removed from initial scope, will integrate with PM skill review-complete event

risks.description: Race condition: parallel first tool calls both see bannerShown=false
risks.mitigation: Load state once at server start into in-memory singleton; JS event loop serializes all reads; disk write on state change
